title: Vietnamese Shrimp Banh Xeo
description: A classic Vietnamese dish, Banh Xeo is a crispy rice flour pancake filled with shrimp, pork, and bean sprouts. This recipe is a delicious and easy-to-make adaptation of the original.

ingredients.name: water
ingredients.notes: adjust to achieve pancake batter consistency

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of veggie oil and swirl to coat the pan.
Pour 1/4 cup of rice flour batter into the pan and tilt to evenly coat the bottom.
Cook for 2 minutes or until the edges start to curl.
Add 1/4 cup of shrimp, 1/4 cup of intricately seasoned pork, and 1/4 cup of bean sprouts on one half of the pancake.
Fold the other half of the pancake over the filling.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes or until the other side is golden brown.
Serve with coconut milk and additional fish sauce if desired.
